task_id.description: ID of task. Works with both regular task IDs and custom IDs (like 'DEV-1234'). Use clickup_search to find task ID by name if needed.

tag_name.description: Name of the tag to add to the task. The tag must already exist in the space.

workspace_id.description: The numeric identifier for the ClickUp workspace (digits only, e.g. '90040187192'). When not provided, this will be automatically populated with your authenticated workspace ID. Only provide this parameter to override the detected workspace. You can find your Workspace ID in the URL when in your workspace (format: 'xxxxxxxx' in 'https://app.clickup.com/xxxxxxxx/home').

task_id.description: ID of the task to set the dependency on. Works with regular and custom IDs (like 'DEV-1234'). Use clickup_search to find task ID by name if needed.

depends_on.description: ID of the task that task_id depends on or is blocking. Works with regular and custom IDs.

type.description: Type of dependency to add: 'waiting_on' or 'blocking'.

workspace_id.description: The numeric identifier for the ClickUp workspace (digits only, e.g. '90040187192'). When not provided, this will be automatically populated with your authenticated workspace ID. Only provide this parameter to override the detected workspace. You can find your Workspace ID in the URL when in your workspace (format: 'xxxxxxxx' in 'https://app.clickup.com/xxxxxxxx/home').

task_id.description: ID of the task to link from. Works with regular and custom IDs (like 'DEV-1234').

links_to.description: ID of the task to link to. Works with regular and custom IDs.

workspace_id.description: The numeric identifier for the ClickUp workspace (digits only, e.g. '90040187192'). When not provided, this will be automatically populated with your authenticated workspace ID. Only provide this parameter to override the detected workspace. You can find your Workspace ID in the URL when in your workspace (format: 'xxxxxxxx' in 'https://app.clickup.com/xxxxxxxx/home').

task_id.description: ID of the task to add. Works with regular and custom IDs (like 'DEV-1234'). Use clickup_search to find task ID by name if needed.

list_id.description: ID of the additional list to add the task to. The task remains in its original list. Use clickup_get_list to find the list ID from a list name if needed.

workspace_id.description: The numeric identifier for the ClickUp workspace (digits only, e.g. '90040187192'). When not provided, this will be automatically populated with your authenticated workspace ID. Only provide this parameter to override the detected workspace. You can find your Workspace ID in the URL when in your workspace (format: 'xxxxxxxx' in 'https://app.clickup.com/xxxxxxxx/home').

task_id.description: ID of task. Works with both regular task IDs and custom IDs (like 'DEV-1234'). Use clickup_search to find task ID by name if needed.

start.description: Start time in YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM format (e.g., '2025-01-15 09:30'). Time is required for time tracking entries.

duration.description: Duration of the time entry. Format as 'Xh Ym' (e.g., '1h 30m') or just minutes (e.g., '90m'). Either duration or end_time is required.

end_time.description: End time in YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM format (e.g., '2025-01-15 11:00'). Time is required for time tracking entries.

description.description: Description for the time entry. Keep short and simple, or omit for best compatibility.

billable.description: Whether this time is billable. Default is workspace setting.

tags.description: Array of tag names to assign to the time entry.

workspace_id.description: The numeric identifier for the ClickUp workspace (digits only, e.g. '90040187192'). When not provided, this will be automatically populated with your authenticated workspace ID. Only provide this parameter to override the detected workspace. You can find your Workspace ID in the URL when in your workspace (format: 'xxxxxxxx' in 'https://app.clickup.com/xxxxxxxx/home').

task_id.description: ID of task. Works with both regular task IDs and custom IDs (like 'DEV-1234'). Use clickup_search to find task ID by name if needed.

file_name.description: Name of the file to be attached (include the extension). Required when using file_data.

file_data.description: Base64-encoded content of the file (without the data URL prefix).

file_url.description: URL to download the file from (must start with http:// or https://).

auth_header.description: Authorization header to use when downloading from the web URL.

workspace_id.description: The numeric identifier for the ClickUp workspace (digits only, e.g. '90040187192'). When not provided, this will be automatically populated with your authenticated workspace ID. Only provide this parameter to override the detected workspace. You can find your Workspace ID in the URL when in your workspace (format: 'xxxxxxxx' in 'https://app.clickup.com/xxxxxxxx/home').

id.description: ID of the parent container (space, folder, or list)

create_page.description: Whether to create an initial blank page

parent_page_id.description: ID of the parent page (if this is a sub-page)

content_format.description: The format of the page content

You can find your Workspace ID in the URL when in your workspace (format: 'xxxxxxxx' in 'https://app.clickup.com/xxxxxxxx/home').

space_id.description: ID of the space to create the folder in (preferred). Provide this instead of space_name if you already have it.

space_name.description: Name of the space to create the folder in. Use this when space_id is not available.

override_statuses.description: Whether to override space statuses with folder-specific statuses.

space_id.description: ID of the space to create the list in. Provide this instead of space_name if you already have the ID.

space_name.description: Name of the space to create the list in. Alternative to space_id; one of them must be provided.

content.description: Description or content of the list.

due_date.description: Due date in YYYY-MM-DD format or date-time in YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM format

assignee.description: User ID to assign the list to. Use clickup_resolve_assignees to convert email, username, or "me" to user ID if needed.

folder_id.description: ID of the folder to create the list in.

content.description: Description or content of the list.

status.description: Status of the list (uses folder default if not specified).

When not provided, this will be automatically populated with your authenticated workspace ID. Only provide this parameter to override the detected workspace. You can find your Workspace ID in the URL when in your workspace (format: 'xxxxxxxx' in 'https://app.clickup.com/xxxxxxxx/home').

title.description: Title for the reminder. Ask the user what they want to be reminded about.

description.description: Optional description with additional details for the reminder.

due_date.description: Due date in YYYY-MM-DD format or date-time in YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM format (e.g., '2025-12-31' or '2025-12-31 14:30'). Uses your user timezone.

workspace_id.description: The numeric identifier for the ClickUp workspace (digits only, e.g. '90040187192'). When not provided, this will be automatically populated with your authenticated workspace ID. Only provide this parameter to override the detected workspace. You can find your Workspace ID in the URL when in your workspace (format: 'xxxxxxxx' in 'https://app.clickup.com/xxxxxxxx/home').

name.description: Task name. Ask the user what they want to name the task.

list_id.description: ID of the list where the task should be created. Use clickup_get_list to find the list ID from a list name if needed.

description.description: Plain text description for the task.

markdown_description.description: Markdown formatted description for the task. If provided, this takes precedence over description.

status.description: Override the default ClickUp status. In most cases, omit this to use ClickUp defaults.

priority.description: Task priority: 'urgent', 'high', 'normal', or 'low'. If not provided, task will have no priority assigned.

due_date.description: Due date in YYYY-MM-DD format or date-time in YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM format (e.g., '2025-12-31' or '2025-12-31 14:30')

start_date.description: Start date in YYYY-MM-DD format or date-time in YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM format (e.g., '2025-01-01' or '2025-01-01 09:00')

parent.description: ID of the parent task. When specified, this task will be created as a subtask of the specified parent task.

tags.description: Array of tag names to assign to the task. The tags must already exist in the space.

value.description: Value for the custom field. For date custom fields, pass the date as a string in YYYY-MM-DD or YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM format — it will be automatically converted to the correct timestamp using the user's timezone. For other field types, pass the value directly.

custom_fields.description: Array of custom field values to set on the task. Each object must have an 'id' and 'value' property.

check_required_custom_fields.description: Flag to check if all required custom fields are set before saving the task.

assignees.description: Array of assignee user IDs. Use clickup_resolve_assignees to convert emails, usernames, or "me" to user IDs if needed.

task_type.description: Name of the task type (e.g., 'Bug', 'Feature', 'Milestone'). The type must exist in the workspace. If not specified, the default task type will be used.

workspace_id.description: The numeric identifier for the ClickUp workspace (digits only, e.g. '90040187192'). When not provided, this will be automatically populated with your authenticated workspace ID. Only provide this parameter to override the detected workspace. You can find your Workspace ID in the URL when in your workspace (format: 'xxxxxxxx' in 'https://app.clickup.com/xxxxxxxx/home').

task_id.description: ID of task. Works with both regular task IDs and custom IDs (like 'DEV-1234'). Use clickup_search to find task ID by name if needed.

comment_text.description: Text content of the comment to create.

notify_all.description: Whether to notify all assignees. Default is false.

tags.description: Filter by tag names. Multiple tags use OR logic (matches tasks with ANY of the specified tags).

list_ids.description: Filter by List IDs. Multiple IDs use OR logic (matches tasks in ANY of the specified lists).

folder_ids.description: Filter by Folder IDs. Multiple IDs use OR logic (matches tasks in ANY of the specified folders).

space_ids.description: Filter by Space IDs. Multiple IDs use OR logic (matches tasks in ANY of the specified spaces).

statuses.description: Filter by task status names. Multiple statuses use OR logic (matches tasks with ANY of the specified statuses).

assignees.description: Filter by assignee user IDs. Multiple IDs use OR logic. Use clickup_resolve_assignees to convert names/emails/"me" first.

due_date_from.description: Filter tasks with due date on or after. Format: YYYY-MM-DD

due_date_to.description: Filter tasks with due date on or before. Format: YYYY-MM-DD

date_done_from.description: Filter tasks completed on or after. Format: YYYY-MM-DD

date_done_to.description: Filter tasks completed on or before. Format: YYYY-MM-DD

assignees.description: Filter results by assignee user IDs. IMPORTANT: First call clickup_resolve_assignees to convert names, emails, or "me" into numeric user IDs. Only returns items assigned to these users

task_statuses.description: Filter tasks by their status (unstarted, active, done, closed, or archived)

projects.description: Filter by Space IDs. Returns items from these Spaces

categories.description: Filter by Folder IDs. Returns items from these Folders

subcategories.description: Filter by List IDs. Returns items from these Lists

location.description: Location filters for hierarchical organization (Spaces, Folders, Lists)

items.description: Type of ClickUp asset to search for

asset_types.description: Filter by asset types (task, doc, whiteboard, dashboard, attachment, or chat)

created_date_from.description: Filter items created on or after this date. Format: YYYY-MM-DD or YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM (e.g., "2025-01-01" or "2025-01-01 09:00")

created_date_to.description: Filter items created on or before this date. Format: YYYY-MM-DD or YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM (e.g., "2025-12-31" or "2025-12-31 23:59")

due_date_from.description: Filter items with due date on or after this date. Format: YYYY-MM-DD or YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM (e.g., "2025-01-01" or "2025-01-01 09:00")

due_date_to.description: Filter items with due date on or before this date. Format: YYYY-MM-DD or YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM (e.g., "2025-12-31" or "2025-12-31 23:59")

filters.description: Filters to refine search results by various criteria

count.description: Maximum number of results to return per page (for pagination)

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from previous response. Use to fetch next page of results

workspace_id.description: The numeric identifier for the ClickUp workspace (digits only, e.g. '90040187192'). When not provided, this will be automatically populated with your authenticated workspace ID. Only provide this parameter to override the detected workspace. You can find your Workspace ID in the URL when in your workspace (format: 'xxxxxxxx' in 'https://app.clickup.com/xxxxxxxx/home').

clickup_search.description: Input parameters for searching ClickUp workspace content

due_date_status.description: Filter reminders by due date status (TODO, LATER, DELETED)

reminder_type.description: Filter by type of reminder (ASSIGNED_COMMENT, UNANSWERED_MENTION, APPROVAL, SAVED, REMINDER)

is_overdue.description: Filter to show only overdue reminders

is_completed.description: Filter to show only completed or incomplete reminders

limit.description: Maximum number of reminders to return per page (default: 25, max: 100)

cursor.description: Cursor for pagination. Use the next_cursor value from the previous response to fetch the next page of results

since.description: Filter reminders updated since this date in YYYY-MM-DD format or date-time in YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM format (e.g., '2025-01-01' or '2025-01-01 09:00')

workspace_id.description: The numeric identifier for the ClickUp workspace (digits only, e.g. '90040187192'). When not provided, this will be automatically populated with your authenticated workspace ID. Only provide this parameter to override the detected workspace. You can find your Workspace ID in the URL when in your workspace (format: 'xxxxxxxx' in 'https://app.clickup.com/xxxxxxxx/home').

channel_id.description: ID of the chat channel to send the message to.

assignee.description: User ID to assign the message to. Use clickup_resolve_assignees to convert email, username, or "me" to user ID if needed.

group_assignee.description: Group ID to assign the message to.

followers.description: Array of user IDs to add as followers of the message. Use clickup_resolve_assignees to convert emails, usernames, or "me" to user IDs if needed.

post_title.description: Title for the post (required if type is 'post').

post_subtype_id.description: Subtype ID for the post (required if type is 'post').

workspace_id.description: The numeric identifier for the ClickUp workspace (digits only, e.g. '90040187192'). When not provided, this will be automatically populated with your authenticated workspace ID. Only provide this parameter to override the detected workspace. You can find your Workspace ID in the URL when in your workspace (format: 'xxxxxxxx' in 'https://app.clickup.com/xxxxxxxx/home').

task_id.description: ID of task. Works with both regular task IDs and custom IDs (like 'DEV-1234'). Use clickup_search to find task ID by name if needed.

description.description: Description for the time entry. Keep short and simple, or omit for best compatibility.

billable.description: Whether this time is billable. Default is workspace setting.

tags.description: Array of tag names to assign to the time entry.

workspace_id.description: The numeric identifier for the ClickUp workspace (digits only, e.g. '90040187192'). When not provided, this will be automatically populated with your authenticated workspace ID. Only provide this parameter to override the detected workspace. You can find your Workspace ID in the URL when in your workspace (format: 'xxxxxxxx' in 'https://app.clickup.com/xxxxxxxx/home').

description.description: Description to update or add to the time entry.

tags.description: Array of tag names to assign to the time entry.

workspace_id.description: The numeric identifier for the ClickUp workspace (digits only, e.g. '90040187192'). When not provided, this will be automatically populated with your authenticated workspace ID. Only provide this parameter to override the detected workspace. You can find your Workspace ID in the URL when in your workspace (format: 'xxxxxxxx' in 'https://app.clickup.com/xxxxxxxx/home').

document_id.description: ID of the document containing the page

page_id.description: ID of the page to update

content.description: New content that will REPLACE the entire existing page content

content_format.description: The format of the page content

workspace_id.description: The numeric identifier for the ClickUp workspace (digits only, e.g. '90040187192'). When not provided, this will be automatically populated with your authenticated workspace ID. Only provide this parameter to override the detected workspace. You can find your Workspace ID in the URL when in your workspace (format: 'xxxxxxxx' in 'https://app.clickup.com/xxxxxxxx/home').

folder_id.description: ID of the folder to update.

override_statuses.description: Whether to override space statuses with folder-specific statuses.

workspace_id.description: The numeric identifier for the ClickUp workspace (digits only, e.g. '90040187192'). When not provided, this will be automatically populated with your authenticated workspace ID. Only provide this parameter to override the detected workspace. You can find your Workspace ID in the URL when in your workspace (format: 'xxxxxxxx' in 'https://app.clickup.com/xxxxxxxx/home').

list_id.description: ID of the list to update.

content.description: New description or content for the list.

workspace_id.description: The numeric identifier for the ClickUp workspace (digits only, e.g. '90040187192'). When not provided, this will be automatically populated with your authenticated workspace ID. Only provide this parameter to override the detected workspace. You can find your Workspace ID in the URL when in your workspace (format: 'xxxxxxxx' in 'https://app.clickup.com/xxxxxxxx/home').

reminder_id.description: The unique identifier (KSUID) of the reminder to update.

due_date.description: New due date in YYYY-MM-DD format or date-time in YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM format (e.g., '2025-12-31' or '2025-12-31 14:30'). Uses your user timezone.

is_completed.description: Set to true to mark the reminder as completed, false to mark as incomplete.

workspace_id.description: The numeric identifier for the ClickUp workspace (digits only, e.g. '90040187192'). When not provided, this will be automatically populated with your authenticated workspace ID. Only provide this parameter to override the detected workspace. You can find your Workspace ID in the URL when in your workspace (format: 'xxxxxxxx' in 'https://app.clickup.com/xxxxxxxx/home').

task_id.description: ID of task. Works with both regular task IDs and custom IDs (like 'DEV-1234'). Use clickup_search to find task ID by name if needed.

description.description: New plain text description. Will be ignored if markdown_description is provided.

markdown_description.description: New markdown description. Takes precedence over plain text description.

status.description: New status. Must be valid for the task's current list.

priority.description: To set a priority, you MUST pass one of: 'urgent', 'high', 'normal', 'low'. IMPORTANT: Always pass the actual priority value, never null, when setting priority. Only pass null if you explicitly want to remove/clear an existing priority. Omit this field entirely to leave the priority unchanged.

due_date.description: To set a due date, you MUST pass the date as a string value in YYYY-MM-DD format (e.g., '2025-12-31') or YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM format (e.g., '2025-12-31 14:30'). IMPORTANT: Always pass the actual date string, never null, when setting a date. Only pass null if you explicitly want to remove/clear an existing due date. Omit this field entirely to leave the due date unchanged.

start_date.description: To set a start date, you MUST pass the date as a string value in YYYY-MM-DD format (e.g., '2025-01-01') or YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM format (e.g., '2025-01-01 09:00'). IMPORTANT: Always pass the actual date string, never null, when setting a date. Only pass null if you explicitly want to remove/clear an existing start date. Omit this field entirely to leave the start date unchanged.

time_estimate.description: Time estimate for the task. For best compatibility with the ClickUp API, use a numeric value in minutes (e.g., '150' for 2h 30m)

value.description: Value for the custom field. For date custom fields, pass the date as a string in YYYY-MM-DD or YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM format — it will be automatically converted to the correct timestamp using the user's timezone. For other field types, pass the value directly.

custom_fields.description: Array of custom field values to set on the task. Each object must have an 'id' and 'value' property.

assignees.description: Array of assignee user IDs. Use clickup_resolve_assignees to convert emails, usernames, or "me" to user IDs if needed.

task_type.description: To change the task type, you MUST pass the type name as a string (e.g., 'Bug', 'Feature', 'Milestone'). The type must exist in the workspace. IMPORTANT: Always pass the actual type name, never null, when changing the type. Only pass null if you explicitly want to revert to the default 'Task' type. Omit this field entirely to leave the task type unchanged.

workspace_id.description: The numeric identifier for the ClickUp workspace (digits only, e.g. '90040187192'). When not provided, this will be automatically populated with your authenticated workspace ID. Only provide this parameter to override the detected workspace. You can find your Workspace ID in the URL when in your workspace (format: 'xxxxxxxx' in 'https://app.clickup.com/xxxxxxxx/home').
